reason: Implemented the streaming message segmentation fix so assistant output is split around tool calls and rendered chronologically in the message list.
notes: Added active assistant message tracking, tool-boundary placeholder removal, new assistant segment creation after tool calls, and safer error fallback handling.

reason: Added shared workspace file search and read helpers that power all four AI tools without duplicating repository logic.
notes: Includes listing, global search, keyword location, and line-range extraction helpers.

reason: Added the OpenAI tool schemas and workspace-bound invocation preparation layer required for model tool calling.
notes: Validates tool arguments with Zod and returns structured descriptors for UI events.

reason: Replaced the old unused OpenAI helper with the new tool-aware chat orchestration flow using the OpenAI SDK.
notes: Handles streamed deltas, tool call loops, and tool result messages.

reason: Wired the HTTP chat endpoint to the new OpenAI tool orchestration and SSE event stream for tool calls and tool results.
notes: Still persists user and assistant messages to Supabase.

reason: Updated the client chat hook to render tool call lifecycle events and keep tool statuses synchronized in the conversation thread.
notes: Now tracks tool call ids from the SSE stream.

reason: Expanded the tool call type so client state can identify and update individual tool invocations.
notes: Added artifactId to support document navigation from tool cards.

reason: Adjusted the live-message rendering so completed tool call cards do not keep showing the streaming loading indicator.
notes: Only plain assistant placeholders now render the thinking dots.

reason: Updated tool call navigation to resolve artifacts by id first and then by name, enabling precise file jumps from tool cards.
notes: Works with read/range tool results.

reason: Declared zod as a direct dependency because the new tool layer uses Zod schemas at runtime and type validation boundaries.
notes: Version added matches the lockfile entry already present in the workspace.

reason: Kept the root dependency manifest aligned with package.json after adding the direct zod dependency.
notes: Only the root dependency list was updated; the existing zod package entry already existed in the lockfile.

reason: Implements server-side extraction and normalization for txt, md, pdf, and docx files into line arrays.
notes: Uses built-in parsing logic rather than external packages.

reason: Provides Supabase persistence and retrieval helpers for uploaded workspace files, plus a reusable line-range helper for future AI reads.
notes: Server-side data access only.

reason: Wraps the workspace file API for the client-side page orchestration layer.
notes: Handles fetch, upload, and response validation.

reason: Converts persisted file rows into ArtifactViewer artifacts so uploaded files render with the existing line-based viewer.
notes: Keeps UI mapping separate from data access.

reason: Exposes workspace-scoped GET and POST endpoints for listing and uploading extracted files.
notes: Validates workspace existence and multipart uploads.

reason: Adds the workspace file header upload control to the left panel while keeping the viewer composition-focused.
notes: Now accepts fileCount and onUploadFiles props.

reason: Reworks the empty state into a file upload call to action with the supported document formats.
notes: Removed the old sample deploy wording.

reason: Provides the new top-of-panel upload entry point and file count display without bloating the viewer entry file.
notes: Uses neutral styling consistent with the app.

reason: Orchestrates workspace file loading, upload actions, hidden file input handling, and artifact state synchronization.
notes: Keeps the page as the composition layer and delegates extraction/persistence to helpers.

reason: Adds the new Supabase table and related indexes/triggers needed to persist uploaded files and extracted lines.
notes: Includes RLS enablement and updated_at trigger.

reason: Extends the generated-style database contract with workspace file row, insert, and relationship types.
notes: Keeps client/server type usage explicit.

reason: Centralizes file-type allowlisting, size limits, and accept-string generation for upload validation.
notes: Shared by client and server code.

reason: This is the top-level workspace composition and controls the left ArtifactViewer panel where upload support should be integrated.
notes: Contains current workspace state, sample artifacts, and panel layout.

reason: This is the workspace panel component that will likely host upload/dropzone and file preview behavior.
notes: Currently only renders tabs, content, and an empty state CTA.

reason: This empty state is the most likely UI entry point for adding upload affordances and supported-format guidance.
notes: Currently only offers a sample deploy button.

reason: Contains an existing attachment button that may inform or share UX patterns for file input styling.
notes: No file upload logic exists yet.

reason: Shows the established Supabase repository pattern to mirror for workspace file persistence.
notes: Useful for future repository separation.

reason: Provides the repository structure and validation/error-handling style to follow for new file ingestion helpers.
notes: Good reference for server-side data access conventions.

reason: This file will need to be extended to include any new file/document tables introduced by the migration.
notes: Must stay in sync with Supabase schema.

reason: Baseline migration shows current tables and trigger/RLS patterns to extend for uploaded files.
notes: New migration should follow the same style.

reason: Defines the existing API style for workspace list/create routes, which new file routes should match.
notes: Validates JSON handling and error responses.

reason: Shows the pattern for workspace-scoped API routes that the file ingestion route should mirror.
notes: Useful for params handling and 404 behavior.

reason: Replaced mock workspace state with Supabase-loaded workspaces, added workspace creation flow, and wired the page to the new chat loader and modal.
notes: Main UI orchestrator for the feature.

reason: Sidebar now shows real workspace rows, adds a plus button for creating workspaces, and handles the empty-workspace state.
notes: Desktop navigation entrypoint.

reason: New modal component for creating workspaces from the sidebar/mobile header CTA with validation and inline error handling.
notes: Keeps workspace creation UI isolated.

reason: Hook now loads persisted workspace chat history from Supabase before streaming new messages and blocks sends while history is loading.
notes: Client-side chat state and streaming logic.

reason: New API route to list workspaces and create a new workspace with validation.
notes: Server boundary for workspace CRUD.

reason: New API route to return the latest conversation and persisted messages for a workspace.
notes: Server boundary for workspace-specific chat loading.

reason: Chat streaming route now enforces valid workspace ownership for conversations and no longer falls back to the old auto-created default workspace flow.
notes: Prevents chats from escaping the selected workspace.

reason: Added a listWorkspaces helper used by the new workspace listing API.
notes: Keeps workspace data access centralized.

reason: Added workspace conversation listing helpers used by the workspace chat loader.
notes: Supports selecting the active workspace conversation.

reason: Added a neutral empty-state panel so the chat area still has a useful workspace-ready state when there are no messages.
notes: Improves UX for newly created or empty workspaces.

reason: Verified the existing schema already contained workspaces, conversations, and messages, so no migration was needed for this feature.
notes: No file changes required.

reason: Contains the message list and composer layout; updated to make the message list scrollable and remove the separator above the composer.
notes: Added flex sizing and overflow handling to the message list wrapper and removed the composer top border.

reason: Provides the chat panel container whose flex sizing must allow the internal scroll area to shrink properly.
notes: Added min-h-0 to the chat panel wrapper and its sibling split panel wrapper.

reason: Lifted settings state to the workspace page and passed shared settings into the sidebar, artifact viewer, and command center.
notes: Also updated the mobile shell to reflect theme changes.

reason: Converted modal controls to receive shared settings state and dispatch updates instead of maintaining isolated local state.
notes: The modal now reflects the app theme and density state.

reason: Sidebar now passes the shared settings state into the modal so theme changes and control updates can affect the whole app.
notes: The settings button still opens the modal.

reason: Artifact rendering now responds to shared line-number, font-size, theme, and density settings.
notes: Text and sheet rendering both use the shared settings contract.

reason: Chat panel now respects shared theme, density, and auto-scroll settings.
notes: Auto-scroll can be toggled off from the modal.

reason: Introduced a shared typed settings contract to avoid duplicating setting shapes and to keep state updates explicit.
notes: Defines the default workspace settings and updater type.
